slides.title: Umphakatsi Wase-Afrika Wasendvulo: iGibhithe (Egypt)
slides.lead: Luhambo lwekwenyuka uMfula iNayili (Nile) siyohlangana nebofaro, emaphiramidi, nekubhala ngetitfombe kwenye yemiphakatsi lemidzala kunayo yonkhe e-Afrika.

media.alt: Emaphiramidi lamatsatfu lagolide nelilanga lelikhanyako liphuma ngetulu kwelihlane eceleni komfula loluhlata sasibhakabhaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='250' cy='50' r='26' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='120' width='320' height='60' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='24' width='30' height='180' fill='#4a86b5' opacity='0.85'/><path d='M120 120 L160 52 L200 120 Z' fill='#d8b45a'/><path d='M70 120 L100 74 L130 120 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/><path d='M190 120 L215 82 L240 120 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Buta bafundzi kutsi bavele bati ini ngeGibhithe yasendvulo - emaphiramidi, bomumi (mummies), nebofaro. Chaza kutsi iGibhithe ise-Afrika, enyakatfo-mphumalanga, nekutsi lena bekungenye yemiphakatsi yekucala emhlabeni, buyela emuva ngetulu kweminyaka lengu-5000. 'Imphucuko' isho umphakatsi lomkhulu, lohleliwe lonemadolobha, hulumende, kubhala, netinkholelo letihlanganyelwako.

slides.title: Imphucuko yase-Afrika, endvulo kakhulu
slides.lead: iGibhithe yasendvulo yakhula enyakatfo-mphumalanga ye-Afrika ngetulu kweminyaka lengu-5000 leyendlulako.

blocks.text: iGibhithe live lelisenyakatfo-mphumalanga ye-**Afrika**. Etulu kweminyaka leyinkhulungwane, yenye yemiphucuko yekucala lemikhulu emhlabeni yakhula lapha. Yahlala sikhatsi lesidze kakhulu ngobe iGibhithe beyinemincele yemvelo - emahlane, tilwandle netiwa - lokwenta kwaba matima kutsi titsa tihlasele.

items: iGibhithe iyincenye yelikhontinenti lase-Afrika, eceleni kweLwandle Lolubovu (Red Sea) neLwandle iMedithera (Mediterranean).
Imphucuko yakhula futsi yashintja etulu kweminyaka leyinkhulungwane.
Sifundza ngayo emanxiweni, emathuneni, imidvwebo, nekubhala kwasendvulo.

slides.notes: Cinisa umcondvo losemcoka we-CAPS: iGibhithe ingumphakatsi wase-Afrika, awehlukaniswa ne-Afrika. Khombisa emephu kutsi iselikhontinenti letfu. Chaza kutsi bochwepheshe bemlandvo bafundza umlandvo basebentisa bufakazi - lapha lobo bufakazi takhiwo, emathuna, imidvwebo lesetibondzeni, nekubhala lokwasala. [SME] Cinisekisa emagama emephu/indzawo kutsi ayavumelana ne-athlazi yeliklasi lakho.

slides.title: UMfula iNayili (Nile)

blocks.text: I**Nayili (Nile)** ngumfula lomkhulu kunayo yonkhe e-Afrika. Igeleta isuka eningizimu iye enyakatfo bese itfululela eLwandle iMedithera (Mediterranean). Incenye lenkhulu yeGibhithe yalihlane lelishisako, lelomile, ngako cishe wonkhe umuntfu bekahlala edvutane nemfula.

Onkhe ehlobo iNayili beyi**khukhula**. Nakwehla emanti futsi, beshiya inhlabatsi lecebile, lemnyama lebeyibitwa ngekutsi *inhlabatsi yemkhukhulo (alluvial soil)*. Lenhlabatsi beyinhle kakhulu ekukhuliseni titjalo, ngako emasimi lafanako abengalinywa umnyaka nemnyaka.

items: INayili yaniketa bantfu emanti ekunatsa nawekunisela titjalo tabo.
Bekungumgwaco lomatasatasa wetikepe letatsitfwala bantfu nemphahla.
Kukhukhula kwemnyaka nemnyaka kwenta inhlabatsi yavundza kwentela kulima.

media.alt: Umfula loluhlata sasibhakabhaka lugeleta emkhatsini wemasimi laluhlata neselihlane leliphuti ngemaceleni omabili.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#e8d9a8'/><rect x='104' width='32' height='160' fill='#4a86b5'/><rect x='80' width='24' height='160' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='136' width='24' height='160' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='40' cy='36' r='16' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Loku kusenhlitiyweni yesihloko: indzawo yakha yonkhe intfo. Chaza umjikelezo wekukhukhula ngalula - emanti amboze emasimi, bese ayehla ashiye udzaka lomusha lowenta titjalo tikhule kahle. Ngaphandle kweNayili, iGibhithe ngabe yonkhe iyilihlane. Buta: kwentiwe yini cishe wonkhe umuntfu ahlala edvutane nemfula?

slides.title: Kuphila nekusebenta eceleni komfula
slides.lead: Umfula waniketa bantfu kudla, emakhaya, nemsebenti umnyaka wonkhe.

blocks.text: Endvulo kakhulu bantfu bekucala lapha bekungebatingeli-nebabutsi lebebahamba bafuna kudla. Ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi bahlala phansi baba **balimi**, bakha emakhaya nemimango eceleni kwemincele yeNayili.

items: Balimi bakhulisa likolo nebhali kwentela kwenta sinkhwa, netibhidvo tekudla.
Bebafuya tilwane letifana netinkhomo, timbuti, netidada.
Bantfu bebasebentisa likhwane lasemfuleni lelibitwa *papyrus* kwenta tikepe, emacansi, neluhlobo lwekucala lweliphepha.
Emakhaya abakhiwa ngetitini tebudzaka lebeyoma abelukhuni elangeni.

media.alt: Emakhwane laphakeme e-papyrus lakhula eceleni kwemanti nesikepe lesincane sekhwane.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='220' height='40' fill='#4a86b5'/><g stroke='#3f6b45' stroke-width='4' fill='none'><line x1='40' y1='120' x2='40' y2='44'/><line x1='58' y1='120' x2='58' y2='54'/><line x1='76' y1='120' x2='76' y2='40'/></g><g fill='#7a8b5a'><circle cx='40' cy='40' r='9'/><circle cx='58' cy='50' r='9'/><circle cx='76' cy='36' r='9'/></g><path d='M120 132 q30 -18 60 0 q-30 10 -60 0 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenta imphilo yansuku tonkhe iphile. I-papyrus liligama lelihle lekuchumana - beyikhula emfuleni futsi yayisetjentiswa kwenta luhlobo lwekucala lweliphepha, lapho ligama lelitsi 'paper' liphuma khona. Tindlu tetitini tebudzaka tichumana naloko bafundzi labangase bakwati ngekwakha. Gcizelela kutsi imphilo yansuku tonkhe beyitsembele kangakanani emfuleni nasekukhukhuleni kwawo.

slides.title: iGibhithe yaseNhla neyaseNsi tihlangana ndzawonye
slides.lead: Tincenye letimbili teGibhithe tahlanganiswa ngaphansi kwembusi munye.

blocks.text: Ngobe iNayili igeleta isuka eningizimu iye enyakatfo, iGibhithe beyihlukaniswe yaba emave lamabili. Incenye leseningizimu beyibitwa ngekutsi **iGibhithe yaseNhla (Upper Egypt)** naleseNyakatfo, edvutane nelwandle, beyibitwa **iGibhithe yaseNsi (Lower Egypt)**. Loku kungase kubonakale kuphambene, kodvwa 'yaseNhla' isho ngetulu emfuleni, edvutane nalapho ucala khona.
Endvulo lamave lamabili ahlanganiswa aba ngumbuso munye lobeubuswa yinkhosi yinye. Loku kwacala lomudvwa lomudze wemakhosi eGibhithe lesiwabita ngekutsi **bofaro (pharaohs)**.

items: iGibhithe yaseNhla beyiseningizimu, iGibhithe yaseNsi enyakatfo.
Tahlanganiswa taba live linye ngaphansi kwembusi munye.
Inkhosi beyembatsa umchele lokhetsekile lokhombisa kutsi ibusa onkhe emave omabili.

media.alt: Imephu lelula lekhombisa iGibhithe yaseNhla eningizimu neyaseNsi enyakatfo tihlanganiswa yiNayili.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 170' role='img'><rect width='200' height='170' fill='#e8d9a8'/><rect x='88' y='10' width='24' height='150' fill='#4a86b5'/><rect x='60' y='10' width='80' height='70' fill='#a8bcae' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='60' y='92' width='80' height='68' fill='#c8b89a' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='84' y='6' width='32' height='10' fill='#4a86b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sula lokudzidzekisa lokujwayelekile: iGibhithe 'yaseNhla' iseningizimu ngobe iphakeme ngetulu enkhambweni yemfula. Sebentisa indlela umfula logeleta ngayo kuchaza loku. Kuhlangana kwemave lamabili kungumzuzu iGibhithe yaba ngumbuso munye. [SME] Bochwepheshe bemlandvo babeka lolusuku cishe nga-3000 BCE; gcina emagama atsi 'endvulo' ngaphandle kwekutsi ufuna kwetfula lolusuku.

slides.title: Ifaro (pharaoh): inkhosi nankulunkulu
slides.lead: Ifaro bekungumuntfu lonemandla kunabo bonkhe eGibhithe yonkhe.

blocks.text: Inkhosi yeGibhithe beyibitwa ngekutsi **ifaro (pharaoh)**. Leligama liphuma emagameni asendvulo eGibhithe latsi *per-aa*, lasho 'lindlu lenkhulu'. Ifaro bekungumholi wahulumende nemholi wenkholo ngesikhatsi sinye.

items: Bantfu bebakholelwa kutsi ifaro bekungunkulunkulu ngesimo semuntfu.
Bekunguye umnikati welive futsi lowenta imitsetfo.
Bekahola libutfo futsi engamele kwakhiwa kwemathempeli nemaphiramidi.
Nakubulawa ifaro, indvodzana yakhe beyivamise kuba ngufaro lolandzelako.

media.alt: Inhloko yefaro lembetse umchele weGibhithe lophakeme lonemibhalo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 160 170' role='img'><rect width='160' height='170' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M56 60 q24 -40 48 0 v70 h-48 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/><g stroke='#4a86b5' stroke-width='6'><line x1='60' y1='70' x2='60' y2='128'/><line x1='72' y1='64' x2='72' y2='128'/><line x1='88' y1='64' x2='88' y2='128'/><line x1='100' y1='70' x2='100' y2='128'/></g><ellipse cx='80' cy='108' rx='22' ry='26' fill='#d8a878'/><circle cx='72' cy='104' r='3' fill='#3a2a1a'/><circle cx='88' cy='104' r='3' fill='#3a2a1a'/><path d='M74 118 q6 6 12 0' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ifaro bekuhlanganisa inkhosi, umholi wahulumende, nemholi wenkholo. Loku kuhlangana kwembusi nankulunkulu kwaniketa ifaro emandla lamakhulu. 'Lindlu lenkhulu' (per-aa) ekucaleni beyisho lisigodlo lasebukhosini kwatsi ngemuva yasho umbusi ngekwakhe. [SME] Leminye imitfombo itsi nemaHebheru asebentisa ligama letsi 'pharaoh'; gcina inchazelo ilula eBangeni 5 unamatsele encazelweni yetsi 'lindlu lenkhulu'.

slides.title: Simo semphakatsi weGibhithe
slides.lead: Umphakatsi weGibhithe bewufana nephiramidi: bantfu labambalwa labanemandla ngetulu, bantfu labasebentako labanyenti ngaphansi.

blocks.heading: Ifaro
blocks.text: Ngetulu kakhulu, inkhosi lenkulunkulu lebeyibusa wonkhe umuntfu nayo yonkhe intfo.

blocks.heading: Baphristi, babhali, netiphatsimandla
blocks.text: Bantfu labafundzile lebebaphetse emathempeli, bagcine emarekhodi, futsi basita ifaro kubusa.

blocks.heading: Balimi, tingcweti, netisebenti
blocks.text: Bantfu labanyenti labajwayelekile lebebakhulisa kudla, benta imphahla, futsi bakha titfombe letinkhulu.

slides.notes: Sebentisa simo sephiramidi njengelithuluzi lekukhumbula sihlelo semphakatsi - siyavumelana netakhiwo labatiwa ngato. Babhali bebabalulekile: bebakwati kufundza nekubhala, ngako bebagcina emarekhodi futsi banemisebenti lekhetsekile. Khombisa kutsi bantfu labanyenti bebangabalimi netisebenti lebemisebenti wabo wawusekela wonkhe umuntfu lophezulu.

slides.title: Bonkulunkulu nemphilo ngemuva kwekufa
slides.lead: EmaGibhithe asendvulo abekholelwa kubonkulunkulu labanyenti nasemphilweni ngemuva kwekufa.

blocks.text: EmaGibhithe abekhonta **bonkulunkulu labanyenti besilisa nabesifazane**, lebebakholelwa kutsi balawula lilanga, umfula, kuvunwa, naletinye tincenye temphilo. Baphristi labanemandla bebanakekela emathempeli nemicimbi yenkholo.

Bebakholelwa ngemandla e**mphilweni ngemuva kwekufa** - imphilo lechubekako ngemuva kwekufa. Kwentela kulungisa umtimba wemphilo ngemuva kwekufa, bebawugcina ngekucophelela njenge**mumi (mummy)**. Loku bekubita kakhulu, ngako kuphela labacebile, ikakhulukati bofaro, lebebakwati kukubhadala.

items: EmaGibhithe abekholelwa kutsi umtimba udzinga kugcinwa uphephile kwentela imphilo ngemuva kwekufa.
Imitimba beyentiwa bomumi (mummies) ifakwe emathuneni nekudla nemcebo.
Inkholo nemandla efaro bekuhlobene kakhulu.

media.alt: Umumi logocotwe walala ngekhatsi ebhokisini lelihlotjisiwe.

slides.notes: Phatsa bomumi ngeludzaba lwekufuna kwati nangenhlonipho, hhayi njengentfo lesabekako - chaza kutsi bekungumkhuba wenkholo lomcoka wekunakekela labafile. Kukholelwa emphilweni ngemuva kwekufa ngiso sizatfu semaphiramidi nemcebo lophakatsi kwemathuna, lokuchumana netikrini letilandzelako. Caphela kutsi inkholo yasekela ligunya lefaro.

slides.title: Emaphiramidi neSphinx
slides.lead: EmaGibhithe akha emathuna lamakhulu ematje lasesemile nalamuhla.

blocks.text: EmaGibhithe akha **emaphiramidi** lamakhulu ematje njengemathuna abofaro nemakhosikati. Ngekhatsi bekunemakamelo ekugcina, tindlela letifihliwe, nemabala. Umumi wefaro nemcebo bekufakwa ngekhatsi kwentela imphilo ngemuva kwekufa.
Edvutane nemaphiramidi eGiza kumi i**Sphinx**, sitfombe lesikhulu lesinemtimba webhubesi nenhloko yenkhosi. Simele iGibhithe iminyaka leyinkhulungwane.

items: Emaphiramidi akhiwa ngemacembu lamakhulu etingcweti netisebenti letinelikhono.
Kwakhiwa lokunyenti kwenteka ngesikhatsi sekukhukhula, lapho balimi bebangeke basebente emasimi.
Emaphiramidi latiwa kakhulu aseGiza, edvutane neCairo yalamuhla.

media.alt: Emaphiramidi lamabili lamakhulu nesitfombe seSphinx elihlane.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#e8d9a8'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#d8c48a'/><path d='M60 120 L110 40 L160 120 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/><path d='M150 120 L190 62 L230 120 Z' fill='#b7935a'/><g fill='#c8a24a'><rect x='20' y='104' width='40' height='16'/><path d='M18 104 q16 -22 30 0 Z'/></g><circle cx='28' cy='100' r='2' fill='#3a2a1a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Mangala ngebukhulu bato - takhiwa ngetandla, etulu kweminyaka leyinkhulungwane, futsi tisesemile. Chaza kutsi balimi labajwayelekile basita kutakha ngesikhatsi sekukhukhula, lapho emasimi abo abengaphansi kwemanti. ISphinx ibuyela emandleni efaro (emandla ebhubesi, inhloko yenkhosi). Gcina umoya wekumangala ngempumelelo yase-Afrika.

slides.title: Lithuna laTutankhamen
slides.lead: Nga-1922 bahloli batfola lithuna leligcwele umcebo lefaro losemncane.

blocks.text: **Tutankhamen** bekungufaro lowaba yinkhosi asengumfana futsi wafa asemncane. Iminyaka leyinkhulungwane lithuna lakhe lalele lifihlekile, lingakatsintfwa. Nga-**1922** latfolakala, liseligcwele umcebo wegolide, umgcele wegolide (mask), netintfo tansuku tonkhe letatimbelwe naye.

items: Lithuna lasifundzisa lokunyenti ngendlela bofaro lebebangcwatjwa ngayo.
Beligcwele igolide, bucwebe, imphahla yendlu, nekudla kwemphilo ngemuva kwekufa.
Tutankhamen manje ungomunye wabofaro labatiwa kakhulu emhlabeni.

media.alt: Umgcele wegolide wekungcwatjwa kwefaro lonemibhalo leluhlata sasibhakabhaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 160 170' role='img'><rect width='160' height='170' fill='#2f2a3a'/><path d='M52 44 q28 -26 56 0 v40 q0 44 -28 62 q-28 -18 -28 -62 Z' fill='#e0b83a'/><path d='M52 44 q28 -26 56 0 v14 h-56 Z' fill='#4a86b5'/><g stroke='#4a86b5' stroke-width='4'><line x1='58' y1='58' x2='58' y2='96'/><line x1='102' y1='58' x2='102' y2='96'/></g><circle cx='70' cy='78' r='4' fill='#2f2a3a'/><circle cx='90' cy='78' r='4' fill='#2f2a3a'/><path d='M72 100 q8 6 16 0' stroke='#2f2a3a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><rect x='74' y='112' width='12' height='18' fill='#4a86b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kutfolakala kwanga-1922 ngebochwepheshe bemivubukulo kuyajabulisa kubafundzi - umcebo lofihliwe wangempela. Kubalulekile kubochwepheshe bemlandvo ngobe emathuna labukhosi lamanyenti aphangwa kadzeni, kodvwa lelaTutankhamen belicishe liphelele, ngako lisumtfombo locebile webufakazi ngetinkholelo netintfo tansuku tonkhe. [SME] Lithuna latfolwa licembu laHoward Carter nga-1922; ngeta ligama lakhe nangabe ufuna kubita lochwepheshe wemivubukulo.

slides.title: Ema-hieroglyphs: kubhala ngetitfombe
slides.lead: EmaGibhithe asungula luhlobo lwekubhala lolusebentisa titfombe netimphawu.

blocks.text: Njengobe kuhweba kwakhula, emaGibhithe abedzinga kugcina emarekhodi aloko labakutsenga nalabakutsengisako. Asungula luhlobo lwekubhala ngetitfombe lolubitwa **ema-hieroglyphs**, lapho ngulesinye nesinye sitfombe lesincane nome siphawu simele umsindvo nome umcondvo.

items: Ema-hieroglyphs abecolwa etibondzeni temathempeli futsi abhalwa ephepheni le-papyrus.
Babhali labaceceshelwe ngalokukhetsekile lababitwa *scribes* bafundza kuwafundza nekuwabhala.
Loku kubhala kwasita emaGibhithe kurekhoda umlandvo wawo, imitsetfo, netindzaba.

media.alt: Umugca wetimphawu te-hieroglyph teGibhithe: liso, inyoni, imigca yemanti, nelunyawo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 120' role='img'><rect width='240' height='120' fill='#e8d9b8'/><rect x='10' y='10' width='220' height='100' fill='none' stroke='#b7935a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M30 60 q20 -18 40 0 q-20 18 -40 0 Z' fill='none' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='50' cy='60' r='6' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M92 46 q22 -6 34 8 l-10 4 q-8 12 -24 8 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#4a86b5' stroke-width='3' fill='none'><path d='M150 52 q6 -6 12 0 q6 6 12 0'/><path d='M150 64 q6 -6 12 0 q6 6 12 0'/></g><path d='M200 44 v28 h16' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chumanisa kubhala nekuhweba nekugcina emarekhodi - sidzingo lesibonakalako sadala lokusungulwa lokukhulu. Chaza 'scribe' njengemuntfu lonemsebenti lokhetsekile wekubhala, nekutsi kufundza nekubhala kwaniketa babhali indzawo lebalulekile emphakatsini. Nangabe sikhatsi sivuma, vumela bafundzi basungule siphawu-sitfombe segama labo.

slides.title: Tipho letivela eGibhithe yasendvulo
slides.lead: Imicondvo yaseGibhithe yasendvulo yasita bantfu bakamuva emhlabeni wonkhe.

blocks.heading: Tibalo (Mathematics)
blocks.text: EmaGibhithe adala luhlelo lwekucala lwetibalo asebentisa lona kulinganisa umhlaba nekuhlela takhiwo tabo.

blocks.heading: Kwelapha (Medicine)
blocks.text: Bodokotela beGibhithe bahlanganisa ematsambo lephukile, batfunga tilondza, belapha kugula ngemakhambi, ngisho nekusebenta ematinyo.

blocks.heading: Kubhala neliphepha
blocks.text: Kubhala kwabo ngetitfombe neliphepha le-papyrus bekungetinye tetindlela tekucala tekugcina emarekhodi.

slides.notes: Veta kuchubeka nekushintja: imicondvo yasendvulo isabalulekile nalamuhla. EmaGibhithe alinganisa emasimi futsi asungula indlela yekwakha emaphiramidi laculekile, laqondile asebentisa tibalo. Lwati lwabo ngemtimba lwavela ngenca yekulungisa bomumi. Gcizelela kutsi lokuphumelela kwaphuma emphakatsini wase-Afrika.

slides.title: iGibhithe yasendvulo ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi

events.label: Batingeli-nebabutsi bahlala phansi baba balimi eceleni kweNayili
iGibhithe yaseNhla neyaseNsi tihlanganiswa ngaphansi kwefaro munye

slides.notes: Sebentisa loluhlu lwesikhatsi kubuyeketa sifundvo sonkhe ngekulandzelana. Chaza kutsi tinsuku te-'BCE' timatima eBangeni 5, ngako sisebentisa 'endvulo' na-'cishe eminyakeni lengu-5000 leyendlulako'. Buta bafundzi kutsi baphindze balandzise indzaba yeGibhithe basebentisa loluhlu lwesikhatsi njengesicondzisi. [SME] Lungisa ube tinsuku te-BCE letinembile (kuhlanganiswa c.3000 BCE, emaphiramidi eGiza c.2500 BCE) nangabe liklasi lakho lisebentisa tona.

slides.title: Loko lesikufundzile
slides.lead: iGibhithe yasendvulo beyingumphucuko lomkhulu wase-Afrika lowakhelwa nguMfula iNayili, wabuswa bofaro, futsi ukhunjulwa ngemaphiramidi nekubhala kwawo ngetitfombe.

blocks.text: **UMfula iNayili (Nile)** waniketa emaGibhithe emanti, kudla, nendlela yekuhamba. **Ifaro** wabusa njengenkhosi nankulunkulu, asitwa baphristi nebabhali. EmaGibhithe abekholelwa ku**bonkulunkulu labanyenti** nasemphilweni ngemuva kwekufa, futsi akha **emaphiramidi** njengemathuna. Asungula kubhala kwe**ma-hieroglyph** futsi enta kutfolakala kwetintfo etibalweni nasekwelapheni lokusabalulekile nalamuhla.

blocks.question: Chaza tindlela letimbili uMfula iNayili lobewubalulekile ngato kumaGibhithe asendvulo.
Bekungubani ifaro, futsi bekanemandla lamakhulu ngani?
Bala intfo yinye emaGibhithe asendvulo layakha nome layasungula, futsi utsi kwakubalulekile ngani.

slides.notes: Vala ngekuchumanisa tonkhe tintsambo tibuyele eNayili - indzawo yenta imphucuko yakwazi kuba khona. Sebentisa leyo mibuto lemitsatfu emsebentini lobhaliwe nome ingcikitsi yeliklasi; kwabiwa kwemamaki kulandzela indlela ye-CAPS Sigaba Semkhatsi. Khumbuta bafundzi kutsi lena beyingumphucuko wase-Afrika, uchumanisa sihloko nekufundvwa kwemlandvo we-Afrika.
